clinician.summary: Female patient ophthalmology review T1DM. Bilateral proliferative diabetic retinopathy; PRP completed June 2025; HbA1c 8.2% Dec 2025; neuropathy noted; insulin pump discussed

patient.summary: Female patient underwent investigation and treatment for haemorrhoids. Flexible sigmoidoscopy showed inflamed bowel, with biopsies taken. Skin tags were removed, and haemorrhoids were injected. Patient advised to avoid constipation, straining, and spending too long on the toilet. Outpatient follow-up appointment scheduled in 6 weeks

pharmacist.summary: No medications documented. Patient has history of vomiting with codeine.
